title: mentha × rotundifolia subsp. macrostachya
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia subsp. macrostachya, commonly known as Corsican mint, is a subspecies of hybrid mint that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Corsican mint include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, soothe headaches, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. The leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
